name: Enforce SSH Version 2
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether ip.ssh.version matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: SSHv1 must be disabled and SSHv2 enforced.
remediation: conf t; ip ssh version 2; line vty 0 15; transport input ssh; end; wr mem

name: Disable Telnet on VTY
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether line.vty.transport matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: Telnet must not be allowed on management lines.
remediation: conf t; line vty 0 15; transport input ssh; end; wr mem

name: Enable AAA New Model
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether aaa.new-model matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: AAA framework must be enabled for centralized auth.
remediation: conf t; aaa new-model; end; wr mem

name: Use TACACS or RADIUS for Login
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether aaa.authentication.login.default matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: Default login must use centralized authentication first.
remediation: conf t; aaa authentication login default group tacacs+ local; end; wr mem

name: Enable Command Accounting
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether aaa.accounting.commands matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: Privileged command execution must be audited.
remediation: conf t; aaa accounting commands 15 default start-stop group tacacs+; end; wr mem

name: Disable SNMPv1 and SNMPv2c
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether snmp.version matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: Legacy SNMP versions must be removed.
remediation: conf t; no snmp-server community public; no snmp-server community private; end; wr mem

name: Configure SNMPv3 AuthPriv
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether snmp.v3.user matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: SNMPv3 users with authPriv must exist.
remediation: conf t; snmp-server group SEC v3 priv; snmp-server user snmpops SEC v3 auth sha AuthPass123 priv aes 128 PrivPass123; end; wr mem

name: Send Logs to Remote Syslog
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether logging.host matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: Centralized logging is required for forensics.
remediation: conf t; logging host 10.10.10.10 transport udp port 514; logging trap informational; end; wr mem

name: Configure NTP Servers
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether ntp.server matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: Network time sync must be configured.
remediation: conf t; ntp server 10.10.20.10 prefer; ntp server 10.10.20.11; end; wr mem

name: Enable NTP Authentication
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether ntp.authenticate matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: NTP must be authenticated to prevent time spoofing.
remediation: conf t; ntp authenticate; ntp authentication-key 1 md5 NtpKey123; ntp trusted-key 1; end; wr mem

name: Restrict Management Access with ACL
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether line.vty.access-class matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: VTY access should be limited to management subnets.
remediation: conf t; ip access-list standard MGMT-ACL; permit 10.10.0.0 0.0.255.255; line vty 0 15; access-class MGMT-ACL in; end; wr mem

name: Disable HTTP Management
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether ip.http.server matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: Embedded web server must be disabled unless required.
remediation: conf t; no ip http server; no ip http secure-server; end; wr mem

name: Disable CDP on Untrusted Ports
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.

recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: Discovery protocols leak topology details on edge ports.
remediation: conf t; interface range gi1/0/1-48; no cdp enable; end; wr mem

name: Enable Port Security on Access Ports
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether switchport.port-security matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: Access ports should limit learned MAC addresses.
remediation: conf t; interface range gi1/0/1-48; switchport mode access; switchport port-security; switchport port-security maximum 5; end; wr mem

name: Enable DHCP Snooping
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether ip.dhcp.snooping matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: Rogue DHCP responses must be blocked.
remediation: conf t; ip dhcp snooping; ip dhcp snooping vlan 10,20,30; end; wr mem

name: Enable Dynamic ARP Inspection
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether ip.arp.inspection matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: ARP spoofing should be mitigated using DAI.

name: Enable BPDU Guard on Edge Ports
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.

recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.

name: Configure Storm Control
issue_description: Security hardening control for cisco switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether storm-control matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.
Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.

remediation: conf t; interface range gi1/0/1-48; storm-control broadcast level 1.00; storm-control multicast level 1.00; end; wr mem

name: Enable SSH and Disable Telnet

Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.

issue_description: Security hardening control for huawei switch platform.

Apply change during approved maintenance window.
Verify behavior after change with operational tests.
Capture post-change evidence for audit records.
check_logic: SSH users should be restricted to secure service types.
remediation: system-view; ssh user admin authentication-type password; ssh user admin service-type stelnet; quit; save

name: Configure RADIUS Authentication Scheme

name: Configure Command Accounting
issue_description: Security hardening control for huawei switch platform.
verification_note: Check whether aaa.accounting-scheme matches expected policy value.
recommendation_details: Validate current running configuration before change.

issue_description: Security hardening control for huawei switch platform.

issue_description: Security hardening control for huawei switch platform.

name: Configure NTP Unicast Servers

name: Restrict VTY Access with ACL
